hooks.command: TODAY=$(date +%Y-%m-%d); REPO=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .); DIR="$REPO/local-workspace/sessions"; ls ${DIR}/${TODAY}-*.md 2>/dev/null | grep -q . || echo "ACTION REQUIRED: No session note exists for today. Create local-workspace/sessions/${TODAY}-HHmm-slug.md now, before writing more files."

REPO=$(git -C "$(pwd)" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$REPO" ] && cd "$REPO" && BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null) && case "$BRANCH" in operator/*) git add local-workspace/ && git diff --cached --quiet || git commit -m 'chore: auto-save session work [skip ci]' && git push origin HEAD --quiet 2>&1 || true ;; main|master) echo 'WARNING: On main branch — auto-save skipped. Switch to an operator/* branch to enable auto-save and the QA pipeline.' ;; *) echo "WARNING: Branch '$BRANCH' is not an operator/* branch — auto-save skipped." ;; esac
